paragraphs.text: THE 100% AGREEMENT AMONG FAMILY MEMBERS, CLOSE RELATIVES, INFLUENCING KEY PERSON ARE THE DECIDING FACTOR!

UNDERSTAND THIS: 100% AGREEMENT among family members, close relatives, and key influencers is not just desirable - it is ESSENTIAL for maximizing the chances of resurrection. WHEN EVERY VOICE IS UNITED, the spiritual power generated is immense, creating a strong, unbreakable bond that aligns perfectly with OUR DIVINE WILL.

KNOW THIS: TOTAL UNITY signifies that all involved are committed to the same divine purpose, leaving no room for doubt or division. WHEN THERE IS COMPLETE AGREEMENT, the barriers to resurrection are removed, and the path to bringing a soul back is made clear. THIS UNITY is a reflection of the divine harmony that exists in HEAVEN, and it is this harmony that WE require for the miracle of resurrection to occur.

LET IT BE CLEAR: MAXIMUM CHANCE OF RESURRECTION is only achieved when there is 100% AGREEMENT. ANY LESS and the foundation becomes unstable, jeopardizing the entire process. UNITY IS STRENGTH, and in strength lies the potential for THE DEAD TO RISE.
"Moderate agreement brings a reasonable chance of resurrection, yet the cracks in consensus may weaken the divine purpose."
